reforms.description: The Research Council was created to stimulate industrial R&D and reinforce the capabilities of Norwegian industry to meet public client needs, merging five different research institutes.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: The establishment of the Research Council is expected to enhance R&D capabilities, leading to increased innovation and productivity in the industry.
reforms.status_evidence: The reform has been fully operational since its establishment.
reforms.importance_rationale: The creation of the Research Council represents a significant structural change in the R&D landscape of Norway.
reforms.source_quote: The creation of the Research Council represents the merger of five different research institutes, including those focused on fisheries and agriculture.

reforms.description: The ENT and FORNY programmes were introduced to enhance research links between public and private sectors, promoting the commercialization of new products and research results, while also fostering technology diffusion at the regional level through the establishment of regional clusters.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: These initiatives are designed to bridge the gap between research and market application, thereby enhancing innovation and economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: Both programmes have been operational and contributing to innovation since their introduction.
reforms.importance_rationale: While significant, these programmes are part of a broader strategy to enhance knowledge transfer rather than a standalone major reform.
reforms.source_quote: In 1997, a new measure was adopted to foster technology diffusion at the regional level through the establishment of regional clusters.

reforms.description: A new measure was introduced to provide incentives for SMEs to hire individuals with higher education and to establish contacts with universities and colleges.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: By incentivizing SMEs to hire skilled individuals, this measure aims to enhance the overall skill level within the sector, fostering innovation and competitiveness.
reforms.status_evidence: The measure has been actively supporting SMEs since its introduction.
reforms.importance_rationale: This measure is significant for supporting SMEs but does not represent a major overhaul of the innovation ecosystem.
reforms.source_quote: New measure to provide incentives for SMEs with less than 100 employees to hire people with higher education.

reforms.description: The Norwegian Industrial and Regional Development Fund (SND) was reorganized to provide loans, grants, guarantees, and equity capital to SMEs, particularly in rural areas, to enhance their competitiveness and management skills.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: This reorganization aims to improve access to financial resources for SMEs, thereby fostering innovation and growth in the sector.
reforms.status_evidence: The reorganization has been in effect and supporting SMEs since its implementation.
reforms.importance_rationale: The reorganization of SND is significant for enhancing support to SMEs but does not constitute a major reform in the broader innovation policy framework.
reforms.source_quote: The SND provides loans, grants, guarantees and equity capital – up to 50 per cent of external finance – to SMEs mainly in rural and remote areas.
